summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AAPL Bull 2X ETF (AAPU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Apple stock. AAPU was launched on Aug 9, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.

holdings.infoBox: AAPU is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt stock at 36.26%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 30.24%, Apple Inc Swap at 23.12%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 10.06%, and Apple at 9.38%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
